merge_dependabot.description: Review and merge open Dependabot PRs

notes: Run 2902-2903: perf_improvement on agenticchat (single-pass word metrics in ReadabilityPanel analyzeText + cached tokenization in SmartContextSidebar _findRelatedMessages). refactor on sauravcode (extracted shared html_escape into sauravtext, deduplicated from sauravdoc/sauravhl/sauravcov).
previousNotes: Run 2900-2901: create_release on gif-captcha (v1.10.0 — 7 commits since v1.9.0, 2 features + security + perf + refactors). perf_improvement on VoronoiMap (eliminated sqrt from IDW hot loop in vormap_contour.py when power=2, both brute-force and spatial-index paths).
previousPreviousNotes: Run 2898-2899: perf_improvement on ai (single-pass aggregation in fatigue_detector analyze(), O(D*M) mitigation dedup in risk_profiler). security_fix on BioBots (CWE-1321 prototype pollution in labNotebook.js entry.results iteration).
previousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 2896-2897: perf_improvement on sauravcode (merged 6 separate StaticAnalyzer passes in sauravguard into single-pass scanner with pre-compiled class-level regexes â€” 6Ã—N iterations â†’ 1Ã—N). refactor on agenticchat (extracted _makeOverlayPair shared factory from 3 identical _createOverlay implementations in TextExpander, PreferencePanel, ShareOverlay).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousNotes: Run 2878-2879: merge_dependabot on agentlens (merged 6 Dependabot PRs â€” actions/checkout v4â†’v6, actions/attest-build-provenance v2â†’v4, docker/setup-buildx-action v3â†’v4, codecov/codecov-action v5â†’v6, docker/login-action v3â†’v4, pydantic >=2.13.0â†’>=2.13.3). perf_improvement on BioBots (cached linearForecast+rateOfChange in contaminationEarlyWarning ingest() so assess()/trendReport() skip redundant O(n) recomputation; replaced hand-rolled two-pass regression in westernBlot estimateMW() with shared single-pass stats.linearRegression).
previousPreviousPreviousPreviousPrevious: Run 2872-2873: add_tests on agentlens (46 new tests for cli_digest â€” _parse_ts, _filter_by_window, _sum_metric, _count_errors, _pct_change, _arrow, _model_breakdown, _top_sessions, all 3 renderers, cmd_digest integration). code_cleanup on Ocaml-sample-code (stream_buffer O(nÂ²) List.lengthâ†’counter, deduplicate stream_sampleâ†’stream_throttle, sink_stats 4-passâ†’single fold).

Run 2870-2871: code_cleanup on GraphVisual (removed 10 dead private edge-type fields from NetworkReportGenerator + GraphSummarizer, replaced duplicate countComponents() BFS with GraphUtils.findComponents()). code_coverage on Ocaml-sample-code (added 13 missing test suites to coverage workflow â€” aa_tree, astar, bloom_filter, bplus_tree, cellular_automata, constraint, dancing_links, free_monad, huffman, order_statistics_tree, pairing_heap, sat_solver, treap).

Run 2868-2869: security_fix on WinSentinel (CWE-94 â€” HardenScriptGenerator embedded raw FixCommand in { } scriptblock literals, allowing breakout via '}'; now Base64-encodes and uses [scriptblock]::Create()). perf_improvement on agentlens (SessionCorrelator._max_concurrent_usage re-scanned all events per resource O(R*E); now reuses resource_intervals from _build_event_index() for O(E) total).
